series_metadata.series_description: Case work done by Elder Justice Initiative (EJI) unit, which receives elder-related inquiries/complaints forwarded from the Constituent Services section concerning issues like neglect, abuse, or exploitation. Records include, but may not be limited to, evidence, police reports, doctor reports, internal and external correspondence, and case closing letters.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: 2 years after case closed, unless scanned and saved electronically. ; Electronic: 2 years after case closed., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
